Find the bug and provide a corrected Python implementation:
def rolling_average(values, window):
    result = []
    for i in range(len(values)):
        start = i - window
        chunk = values[start:i]
        result.append(sum(chunk) / window)
    return result

The intended output has one average per complete window only.
